channel.title: Tan Hiep To · Research Notes
channel.description: Research notes and engineering insights by Tan Hiep To.

item.title: RAG in Production: evaluation, grounding, and retrieval tuning
item.description: A pragmatic checklist for building reliable RAG pipelines.

item.title: LLM fine-tuning playbook for domain adaptation
item.description: Key steps for data scope, training cycles, and evaluation.

item.title: Scaling recommender systems for AI-native search
item.description: Lessons from ranking, personalization, and evaluation loops.

item.title: Trustworthy AI for cybersecurity detection pipelines
item.description: Robustness, calibration, and explainability in security ML.

item.title: From research to production: my AI engineering workflow
item.description: A workflow for shipping reliable AI systems.

item.title: My learning journey in AI
item.description: From foundational CS coursework to GenAI research.

item.title: Lessons learned from shipping AI projects
item.description: Practical takeaways from building RAG systems and recommender pipelines.
